creator: michael@meiszl.de
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #16)
I could have used a backup from last week (the update was done already a week ago, I just realized that it went wrong somehow today from the weekly checkup mail).
But then I would have had lost some new graphics and articles on my wordpress...

With "done" I just meant me, not the other guy of course.

anyway, tnx, next time I will keep an eye wider open than last week.
